lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਘਰੁ ੯ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 1 ghar 9 |
lines.english: Soohee, First Mehl, Ninth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਚਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਕਸੁੰਭ ਕਾ ਥੋੜੜਿਆ ਦਿਨ ਚਾਰਿ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: kachaa rang kasunbh kaa thorrarriaa din chaar jeeo |
lines.english: The color of safflower is transitory; it lasts for only a few days.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਭੁਲੀਆ ਠਗਿ ਮੁਠੀ ਕੂੜਿਆਰਿ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: vin naavai bhram bhuleea tthag mutthee koorriaar jeeo |
lines.english: Without the Name, the false woman is deluded by doubt and plundered by thieves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗਣ ਵਾਲਾ ਸੇਵੀਐ ਸਚੇ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: rangan vaalaa seveeai sache siau chit laae jeeo |1| rahaau |
lines.english: So serve God the Dyer, and focus your consciousness on the True Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗੇ ਕਾ ਕਿਆ ਰੰਗੀਐ ਜੋ ਰਤੇ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: range kaa kiaa rangeeai jo rate rang laae jeeo |
lines.english: How can one who is already dyed in the color of the Lord's Love, be colored any other color?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਸੇਤੀ ਰਤਿਆ ਜਨਮੁ ਨ ਦੂਜੀ ਵਾਰ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sache setee ratiaa janam na doojee vaar jeeo |1|
lines.english: But those who are attuned to the True Lord, are not reincarnated again. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰੇ ਕੁੰਡਾ ਜੇ ਭਵਹਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਭਾਗਾ ਧਨੁ ਨਾਹਿ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: chaare kunddaa je bhaveh bin bhaagaa dhan naeh jeeo |
lines.english: You wander around in the four directions, but without the good fortune of destiny, you shall never obtain wealth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਰਾਖੇ ਸੇ ਉਬਰੇ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੇ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur raakhe se ubare sabad rate man maeh jeeo |2|
lines.english: Only those who are protected by the Guru are saved; their minds are attuned to the Word of the Shabad. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਗਣਿ ਮੁਠੀ ਜੇ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਬਧਿਕ ਥਾਇ ਨ ਪਾਹਿ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: avagan mutthee je fireh badhik thaae na paeh jeeo |
lines.english: If you are plundered by corruption and vice, you shall wander around, but like a fugitive, you shall find no place of rest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਟੇ ਜਿਨ ਕੇ ਕਪੜੇ ਮੈਲੇ ਚਿਤ ਕਠੋਰ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: chitte jin ke kaparre maile chit katthor jeeo |
lines.english: Those who wear white clothes, but have filthy and stone-hearted minds,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਊਪਜੈ ਦੂਜੈ ਵਿਆਪੇ ਚੋਰ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: tin mukh naam na aoopajai doojai viaape chor jeeo |
lines.english: may chant the Lord's Name with their mouths, but they are engrossed in duality; they are thieves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂਲੁ ਨ ਬੂਝਹਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਸੇ ਪਸੂਆ ਸੇ ਢੋਰ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mool na boojheh aapanaa se pasooaa se dtor jeeo |3|
lines.english: They do not understand their own roots; they are beasts. They are just animals! ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤ ਨਿਤ ਖੁਸੀਆ ਮਨੁ ਕਰੇ ਨਿਤ ਨਿਤ ਮੰਗੈ ਸੁਖ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: nit nit khuseea man kare nit nit mangai sukh jeeo |
lines.english: Constantly, continually, the mortal seeks pleasures. Constantly, continually, he begs for peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਦੁਖ ਦਾਤਾ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਤਿਤੁ ਤਨਿ ਕੈਸੀ ਭੁਖ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sukh dukh daataa man vasai tith tan kaisee bhukh jeeo |4|
lines.english: But one, within whose mind the Giver of pleasure and pain dwells - how can his body feel any need? ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਤਾ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਲਗਹਿ ਦੁਖ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: karataa chit na aavee fir fir lageh dukh jeeo |
lines.english: But he does not think of the Creator Lord, and so he is overtaken by pain, again and again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਕੀ ਵਾਲਾ ਤਲਬੀਐ ਸਿਰਿ ਮਾਰੇ ਜੰਦਾਰੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: baakee vaalaa talabeeai sir maare jandaar jeeo |
lines.english: One who has a karmic debt to pay off is summoned, and the Messenger of Death smashes his head.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੇਖਾ ਮੰਗੈ ਦੇਵਣਾ ਪੁਛੈ ਕਰਿ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: lekhaa mangai devanaa puchhai kar beechaar jeeo |
lines.english: When his account is called for, it has to be given. After it is reviewed, payment is demanded.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਕੀ ਲਿਵ ਉਬਰੈ ਬਖਸੇ ਬਖਸਣਹਾਰੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sache kee liv ubarai bakhase bakhasanahaar jeeo |5|
lines.english: Only love for the True One will save you; the Forgiver forgives. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨ ਕੋ ਕੀਜੈ ਮਿਤੜਾ ਖਾਕੁ ਰਲੈ ਮਰਿ ਜਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: an ko keejai mitarraa khaak ralai mar jaae jeeo |
lines.english: If you make any friend other than God, you shall die and mingle with the dust.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਰੰਗ ਦੇਖਿ ਭੁਲਾਇਆ ਭੁਲਿ ਭੁਲਿ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: bahu rang dekh bhulaaeaa bhul bhul aavai jaae jeeo |
lines.english: Gazing upon the many games of love, you are beguiled and bewildered; you come and go in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਤੇ ਛੁਟੀਐ ਨਦਰੀ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: nadar prabhoo te chhutteeai nadaree mel milaae jeeo |6|
lines.english: Only by God's Grace can you be saved. By His Grace, He unites in His Union. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਫਲ ਗਿਆਨ ਵਿਹੂਣਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਨ ਭਾਲਿ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: gaafal giaan vihooniaa gur bin giaan na bhaal jeeo |
lines.english: O careless one, you are totally lacking any wisdom; do not seek wisdom without the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿੰਚੋਤਾਣਿ ਵਿਗੁਚੀਐ ਬੁਰਾ ਭਲਾ ਦੁਇ ਨਾਲਿ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: khinchotaan vigucheeai buraa bhalaa due naal jeeo |
lines.english: By indecision and inner conflict, you shall come to ruin. Good and bad both pull at you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਕਰਿ ਕਾਰਣੁ ਧਾਰਿਆ ਸਭਸੈ ਦੇਇ ਆਧਾਰੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: jin kar kaaran dhaariaa sabhasai dee aadhaar jeeo |
lines.english: He who created the creation and sustains it, gives sustenance to all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਭੈ ਰਤਿਆ ਸਭ ਜੋਹੀ ਜਮਕਾਲਿ ਜੀਉ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai bhai ratiaa sabh johee jamakaal jeeo |7|
lines.english: Without being attuned to the Word of the Shabad and the Fear of God, all come under the gaze of the Messenger of Death. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਨਿਧਾਰਾ ਆਧਾਰੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੮॥੧॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam na veesarai nidhaaraa aadhaar jeeo |8|1|2|
lines.english: Nanak shall never forget the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the Support of the unsupported. ||8||1||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਕਿਉ ਮਨਹੁ ਵਿਸਾਰੀਐ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: so kiau manahu visaareeai sadaa sadaa daataar jeeo |
lines.english: How can you forget Him from your mind? He is the Great Giver, forever and ever.

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਕਾਫੀ ਘਰੁ ੧੦ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 1 kaafee ghar 10 |
lines.english: Soohee, First Mehl, Kaafee, Tenth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਲੈ ਜਨਮੁ ਸਵਾਰਿ ਵਖਰੁ ਸਚੁ ਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: chalai janam savaar vakhar sach lai |
lines.english: He departs with his life embellished and successful, taking the merchandise of the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਣਸ ਜਨਮੁ ਦੁਲੰਭੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: maanas janam dulanbh guramukh paaeaa |
lines.english: For if you depart with virtue, then pain shall never afflict you. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਹੋਇ ਚੁਲੰਭੁ ਜੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: man tan hoe chulanbh je satigur bhaaeaa |1|
lines.english: The mind and body are dyed in the deep red color of devotional love, if it pleases the True Guru. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਸਚੁ ਸਲਾਹਿ ਸਾਚੇ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: man tan sach salaeh saache man bhaaeaa |
lines.english: One who praises the True Lord with his mind and body, pleases the Mind of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿ ਪਾਏ ਦਰਬਾਰਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਭੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: pat paae darabaar satigur sabad bhai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He is honored in the Darbaar, the Royal Court, of the Lord, through the Shabad, the Word of the True Guru, and the Fear of God. ||1||Pause||
